title: Furf-Addon
description:
An unofficial Addon/Overlay to FurfSky-Reborn that adds old textures and improves bugs.
 
(Based on the new beta version)
body:
**_Furf Addon_**

An addon/overlay for FurfSky Reborn designed for version 1.21.11.

This project focuses on restoring legacy visuals while improving overall stability and usability. It brings back older textures, fixes issues with legacy GUIs, and reduces bugs present in FSR. It also improves performance when using older interface elements.

Features:

- Restoration of old textures and visuals
- Fixes for legacy GUI bugs and errors in FSR
- Improved performance with older GUI elements
- General bug fixes and stability improvements

Requirements:

Catharsis Mod (required, same as the original texture pack)
Note: Catharsis is lightweight and does not impact performance

Important:

This addon must be used together with FurfSky Reborn and Catharsis
If something doesn’t work properly, enable Legacy Items in settings

Disclaimer:
This is an independent project. It is not a continuation of FSL.
(Not even sure if FSL is still alive, but yeah—this is built from scratch.)
